trackerDomains.note: Facebook Pixel / social embeds — cross-site tracking.
Site analytics — page views, sessions, audience.

collectors.usage: A data-management platform designed to segment audiences across sites.
An ad exchange designed to match audience identifiers across sites for real-time ad bidding.
An identity & audience-data company designed to link and enrich consumer profiles.
Designed to personalize and measure ads across the web using a cross-site advertising ID.
Designed to measure site traffic and your on-site behavior for the website owner.
Designed to target and measure advertising, typically using a cross-site identifier.
Designed to match your browsing to your Facebook/Instagram account for ad targeting & measurement.
A customer-data pipeline designed to collect your events and distribute them to many other tools.
Designed to track ad conversions and build advertising audiences.
Designed to measure your behavior on the site.

rollup.label: Linkage to your real identity / email

dataCollection.trackedSince: This Google Analytics ID was first set on Jun 22, 2026 — it resets whenever you clear cookies.

risk.verdict: Very heavy tracking. Your visit is shared widely for ads & profiling.

factors.label: Third-party trackers contacted
factors.detail: 12 known tracking domains loaded resources on this page.

factors.label: Device fingerprinting observed
factors.detail: 3 fingerprinting techniques (WebRTC, audio, canvas) actually ran on this page — these can recognise your device without cookies.

factors.label: Advertising & data-broker cookies
factors.detail: 19 cookies used to target ads or sell audience data.

factors.label: Number of companies receiving data
factors.detail: 15 separate companies can associate this visit with you.

factors.label: Analytics cookies
factors.detail: 6 cookies measuring your behavior on the site.

factors.label: Long-lived tracking cookies
factors.detail: 9 tracking cookies persist for more than 6 months.

factors.label: Cookies missing the Secure flag
factors.detail: 27 cookies could be sent over an unencrypted connection.

factors.label: Unrecognized third-party connections
factors.detail: 15 other third-party domains were contacted but aren't in our known list — unverified, worth a look.

factors.label: Tracker data in local/session storage
factors.detail: 2 tracker keys found outside cookies (storage isn't cleared by 'delete cookies').
